MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Joan D. B. Edelsohn, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Chu Wong Lee
Spencer J. Pahlke, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Jamie Land

Hearing held and Defendant Chu Wong Lee's motion to compel plaintiff to attend and respond to deposition questions, to allow a demonstration by plaintiff and follow up questions at his deposition and request for sanctions is taken under submission. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
